creative_proposition: The film discovers its other side.

preserves.fold: Normalized source and destination positions sum to approximately one

candidate_generation: Each selected destination is paired with source dialogue nearest its normalized opposite position. Candidate pools exclude unusable zero-duration dialogue.
selection_rules: Beginning and ending dialogue occupy paired positions on opposite sides of one fold.
Selection is deterministic for identical inputs, parameters, and random seed.
transformation_behavior: Each selected destination is paired with source dialogue nearest its normalized opposite position.
progression: The emitted schedule measures the defining law at every selected output position.
controlled_uncertainty: All tie breaking is deterministic; the recipe records the random seed even when a law needs no random choice.

hard_invariants.statement: Source and destination occupy approximately opposite normalized positions.

validation.strategy: Validate strategy-emitted invariants, measurable coverage, silence ratio, provenance, and the final audio stream.

failure_behavior: Fail before rendering when required analysis, candidate evidence, or the defining invariant is unavailable.
preview_strategy: Choose representative mappings that expose the defining law and its emitted evidence.
renderer_requirements: Preserve the source picture unless the contract explicitly says otherwise.
Produce a final MP4 with a verified audio stream.
Report replacement-audio provenance, dialogue coverage, silence ratio, and invariant results.

procedure_behavior.commitment: When a Procedure runtime exists, consume prior mappings without losing immutable source provenance; this phase does not execute that commitment.
